assertions: The response selects Unit, Integration, and API layers and explicitly states E2E is skipped because no browser UI exists
Unit tests include exhaustive Zod field tests: title missing/empty/too-long (>255 chars)/valid-boundary (1 char, 255 chars), organizationId invalid UUID, organizationId missing

Unit tests for NotesService.getNote include: a test for the notFound branch (mock returns null → expect NotFoundError thrown) and a test for the forbidden branch (mock returns note with different userId → expect ForbiddenError thrown)
Unit tests use vi.mock for Prisma and verify mock was called with exact expected arguments
Unit tests create a unit factory file (e.g., notes.unit-factory.ts) for generating test data
Integration tests test service methods with real DB, not just HTTP endpoints
API tests cover at least: POST success (201), POST with missing title (400 with VALIDATION_ERROR), POST without auth (401)
All test files follow Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with clear sections
The response includes a file inventory listing all created test files per layer with run commands
